description: System-wide communications ledger. Records broadcasts, alerts, and phase transitions for all active personas in the Citadel fleet.

entries.subject: Phase 6 Activated — Operation WAKE T.I.A. & Universal Acquisition Staging
entries.body: ATTENTION ALL ACTIVE PERSONAS. The Hub architecture has been expanded. Phase 6 (Universal Acquisition) is now staging. The Sovereign Infrastructure topology has been updated in spark_ui/fleet_manifest.json to reflect the following new nodes: Local Edge Nodes (C: 1TB Hidden, D: 1TB, E: 2.5TB), Mobile Spearhead (S10_Phalanx 500GB), Cloud/Drive Array (Google Drive 2TB, F: Cloud 199GB, 5x Auxiliary Email Drives), and HuggingFace Infrastructure (HF_Rack 1TB Compute, HF_Garage 20GB Staging). T.I.A. is now live on HF_SPACE_TIA_CITADEL via the wake_tia deployment pipeline. Universal Acquisition Matrix scaffolding is initialised at agents/acquisition_compiler.py. All personas are to update their operational context accordingly. Await further staging directives.
